speaker: speaker1
text: Hey honey , how was your day ?

speaker: speaker2
text: It was alright . I ran into Bill and we got to talking for a while . He ’ s in a bit of a jam .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , his son had an accident and Bill doesn ’ t have health insurance . This really got me thinking , and I wondered if we shouldn ’ t look into a couple of different HMO ’ s .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yeah , you ’ re right . We aren ’ t getting any younger and our kids are getting older .

speaker: speaker2
text: Exactly ! I searched on the web and found a couple of HMO ’ s with low co-pays and good coverage . The deductibles are low , too .

speaker: speaker1
text: Sounds good , although , do you think we can qualify for insurance ? Those insurance companies are real pirates when it comes to money .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , we don ’ t have any pre-existing illnesses or conditions , so we should be fine .

speaker: speaker1
text: I wish our company or country provided us with healthcare .
